task-1774309622091-zyxvzd.description:
ARCHITECTURE REVIEW — Read the codebase at /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront. Focus on:
- Are 87 service directories justified or over-engineered?
- Are there services that should be consolidated?
- Is the route structure clean or does it have unnecessary nesting?
- Check for dead/unused services and circular dependencies
- Review the Prisma schema for normalization issues
- Check if the extensions/ dir matches what CLAUDE.md describes
Report: list every issue with file path, severity (critical/high/medium/low), and a fix suggestion.

task-1774309622096-rfcnrs.description:
FRONTEND REVIEW — Read all files in /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront/app/routes/ and /app/components/. Focus on:
- Do loaders and actions follow Remix best practices?
- Are error boundaries properly set up on each route?
- Is Polaris v12 used correctly (no deprecated components)?
- Check for missing loading states, empty states, and error states
- Verify each screen renders valid UI and handles edge cases
- Check for hardcoded strings that should be translated
Report: list every issue with file path and line number.

task-1774309622100-5ildb8.description:
BACKEND REVIEW — Read all files in /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront/app/services/ and API routes. Focus on:
- Are the 7 AI translation providers properly abstracted?
- Check for N+1 queries in Prisma usage
- Are webhook handlers idempotent?
- Check billing/subscription logic for edge cases
- Review bulk-translation for memory leaks or unbounded operations
- Check all 11 MENA payment gateway integrations for completeness
Report: list every issue with file path, severity, and fix.

task-1774309622105-veafmf.description:
SECURITY AUDIT — Read auth, security, payments, and webhook files at /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront. Focus on:
- Is the Shopify OAuth flow secure?
- Are all webhooks properly validated with HMAC?
- Check for SQL injection via Prisma raw queries
- Review CSP headers and XSS prevention
- Check GDPR data export/deletion completeness
- Are API keys and secrets properly handled (not in client bundles)?
- Review rate limiting implementation
Report: list every vulnerability with severity and remediation.

task-1774309622107-h2ebl0.description:
TEST COVERAGE REVIEW — Read /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront/test/ directory. Focus on:
- What critical paths have ZERO test coverage?
- Are billing and payment flows tested?
- Do integration tests cover real Shopify API interactions?
- Are mocks realistic or do they hide bugs?
- Is the single e2e test sufficient?
Report: list coverage gaps ranked by business risk.

task-1774309622110-kd4xhm.description:
DX & BUILD REVIEW — Read config files, package.json, and build setup at /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront. Focus on:
- Are dependencies up to date? Any known vulnerabilities?
- Is the TypeScript config strict enough?
- Are there unused dependencies?
- Review the 9 Prisma migrations for issues
- Check if build/deploy scripts are reliable
Report: list every issue with fix suggestion.

task-1774309729100-tyjmu0.description:
ARCHITECT: Full codebase structure audit for /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront

Scan the entire codebase structure. Answer these questions:
- Of the 87 service directories in app/services/, how many contain real logic vs stubs/placeholders? List every stub.
- Which services have overlapping responsibilities and should be merged? (e.g. team/ vs team-management/, rtl/ vs rtl-features/ vs rtl-design/, content/ vs content-translation/ vs content-translator/ vs content-fields/)
- Are there circular dependencies between services? Trace import chains.
- Is there dead code — services imported nowhere? Check every service's import graph.
- Does the route structure match the actual feature set or are there orphan routes?
- CLAUDE.md mentions a language-switcher extension but only rtl-fashion-sections exists. Is this a gap?
- Is 87 services appropriate for this app's complexity, or is it over-fragmented?

Output: JSON array of issues, each with {file, severity, category, description, suggestedFix}.

task-1774309731769-tto9e6.description:
ROUTE-REVIEWER: Full Remix routes audit for /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront

Read every file in app/routes/. For each route, verify:
- Does the loader properly authenticate via Shopify session?
- Does the action validate input and handle errors gracefully?
- Is there an ErrorBoundary? If not, what happens on failure?
- Are there loading/pending states in the UI?
- Does the route handle empty states (no data yet)?
- Are there any raw SQL or unvalidated params in loaders/actions?
- Do translation routes (app.translate.*.tsx) handle missing resourceId?
- Does app.billing.confirm.tsx handle failed/cancelled payments?
- Does app.onboarding.tsx handle partial completion and resumption?
- Are webhook routes (webhooks.*.tsx) idempotent?

Output: table with columns [route, issue, severity, fix].

task-1774309733992-limxml.description:
COMPONENT-REVIEWER: Full React components audit for /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront

Read every file in app/components/. For each component, check:
- Is it using Polaris v12 correctly? Any deprecated v11 components?
- Does it handle RTL layout properly (no hardcoded left/right)?
- Is it accessible (proper ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, focus management)?
- Are there hardcoded English strings that should use translations?
- Does it handle loading, error, and empty states?
- Is state management appropriate (no prop drilling, proper use of context)?
- Are there components that duplicate logic and should be consolidated?
- Check AbayaCustomizer, ModestySelector, HijriDateDisplay for cultural accuracy.
- Check TranslationEditor, SideBySide for usability with long Arabic text.

Output: table with columns [component, issue, severity, fix].

task-1774309737115-1jjcmx.description:
TRANSLATION-ENGINE: Core translation pipeline audit for /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront

Read all files in app/services/translation/, app/services/translation-memory/, app/services/translation-features/, app/services/translation-formatting/, app/services/bulk-processor/. Check:
- Is the AI provider abstraction clean? Can you swap providers without touching callers?
- Is there proper fallback logic when a provider fails or rate-limits?
- Does bulk translation have memory bounds? What happens with 10,000 products?
- Is translation memory actually used to avoid re-translating unchanged content?
- Does the glossary enforce term consistency across providers?
- Is formatting preserved (HTML tags, Liquid variables, markdown)?
- Are API keys loaded securely (server-side only, not bundled to client)?
- Is there retry logic with exponential backoff for provider API failures?
- Are translation costs tracked accurately per provider in TranslationUsage?
- Check for race conditions in concurrent translation requests.

Output: JSON array of issues with {file, line, severity, category, description, fix}.

task-1774309740665-7i8fxt.description:
PAYMENTS-REVIEWER: MENA payments and billing audit for /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront

Read all files in app/services/payments/mena/, app/services/billing/, app/services/currency/, app/services/vat/, app/routes/app.billing.tsx, app/routes/app.billing.confirm.tsx, app/routes/app.payments.tsx, app/routes/api.payments.mena.$.ts, app/routes/api.currency.rates.ts. Check:
- Are all 11 payment gateways (Tamara, Tabby, Mada, HyperPay, Payfort, Sadad, STC Pay, Network International, Telr, COD) fully implemented or are some stubs?
- Is the Shopify Billing API integration correct for subscription management?
- Does billing.confirm handle edge cases: expired sessions, duplicate confirmations, webhook race conditions?
- Is currency conversion using live rates or stale data?
- Is VAT calculation correct for Saudi, UAE, Bahrain, Oman, Kuwait, Qatar?
- Are payment webhook callbacks validated and idempotent?
- Is there proper error handling for declined payments, timeouts, and partial failures?
- Are payment secrets (API keys, merchant IDs) properly stored and rotated?

Output: table with [gateway/feature, status (implemented/stub/broken), issues, fix].

task-1774309744223-lmms2v.description:
CONTENT-SERVICES: Content translation and SEO audit for /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront

Read all files in app/services/product-translation/, app/services/content-translation/, app/services/content-translator/, app/services/content-fields/, app/services/content/, app/services/media-translation/, app/services/media-features/, app/services/schema-org/, app/services/sitemap/, app/services/meta-tags/, app/services/url-slugs/, app/services/url-structure/, app/services/breadcrumb/, app/services/description-generator/, app/services/search/. Check:
- Are there 5 overlapping content services (content/, content-translation/, content-translator/, content-fields/, product-translation/)? Which are actually used?
- Does the SEO schema.org output validate against Google's structured data requirements?
- Does the sitemap include translated URLs with hreflang annotations?
- Are URL slugs properly transliterated for Arabic (not just URL-encoded)?
- Does the description generator produce quality output or generic text?
- Is media translation handling image alt-text and video captions?
- Are meta tags properly set for RTL pages (dir="rtl", lang="ar")?

Output: JSON array of issues with {file, severity, description, fix}.

task-1774309747462-pqw6ad.description:
SECURITY-AUDITOR: Full security and GDPR audit for /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront

Read all files in app/services/security/, app/services/auth/, app/services/gdpr/, app/services/privacy/, app/services/bot-detection/, app/routes/auth.*, app/routes/webhooks.*, app/shopify.server.ts. Check:
- Is the Shopify OAuth flow following current best practices (no implicit grants)?
- Are ALL webhook routes validating HMAC signatures before processing?
- Is there any use of prisma.$queryRaw or prisma.$executeRaw without parameterization?
- Are CSP headers set correctly? Is there an unsafe-inline or unsafe-eval?
- Is there XSS risk in translation output rendering (user-supplied translations displayed as HTML)?
- Are API routes (api.v1.*) properly authenticated and rate-limited?
- Does GDPR data export include ALL user data from all 18 tables?
- Does GDPR deletion cascade properly across related records?
- Are secrets (AI API keys, payment keys) only in environment variables, never in code?
- Is there any sensitive data in client-side bundles (check for .server.ts convention)?
- Are team invites properly scoped and expired?

Output: vulnerability report with [id, severity (critical/high/medium/low), location, description, remediation, cwe].

task-1774309750886-z9dz2e.description:
DATA-LAYER: Database schema, migrations, and caching audit for /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront

Read app/db.server.ts, prisma/schema.prisma, all files in prisma/migrations/, app/services/cache/, app/services/sync/, app/services/translation-memory/. Check:
- Are all 18 Prisma models properly indexed for their query patterns?
- Is there missing cascade delete that could create orphan records?
- Are the 9 migrations clean and reversible?
- Is TranslationCache properly invalidated when source content changes?
- Is TranslationMemory deduplicated (same source text, same target locale)?
- Are there missing unique constraints that could cause duplicate entries?
- Is the Session model properly cleaned up (expired sessions deleted)?
- Are there queries that fetch entire tables instead of paginating?
- Is SQLite appropriate for production or should this migrate to PostgreSQL?
- Check for missing database indexes on foreign keys and frequently filtered columns.
- Is ShopSettings storing API keys in plaintext in the database?

Output: table with [model/migration, issue, severity, fix, sql_if_applicable].

task-1774309754441-2lqvi8.description:
TEST-COVERAGE: Test coverage gap analysis for /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront

Read all files in test/. Cross-reference with app/routes/ and app/services/. Check:
- Which of the 26 routes have ZERO test coverage? List them all.
- Are the 11 payment gateways tested? Which ones have no tests?
- Is the billing flow (subscribe, confirm, cancel, upgrade, downgrade) tested end-to-end?
- Are the 7 AI translation providers tested with realistic mocks?
- Do the MSW mocks in test/mocks/ match the actual Shopify API responses?
- Is the single e2e test (test/e2e/) actually testing a meaningful user flow?
- Are webhook handlers tested for idempotency (duplicate delivery)?
- Are error paths tested (API failures, network timeouts, invalid data)?
- What is the estimated real code coverage percentage?
- Which untested areas carry the highest business risk?

Output: coverage gap report with [area, test_count, risk_level, recommended_tests].

task-1774309759108-n64e4b.description:
REGIONAL-FEATURES: MENA/Arabic localization services audit for /Users/shaker/shopify-dev/rtl-storefront

Read all files in app/services/cultural-ai/, app/services/dialects/, app/services/arabic-features/, app/services/cultural-features/, app/services/mena-regional/, app/services/mena-campaigns/, app/services/mena-design/, app/services/hijri/, app/services/prayer-times/, app/services/fashion-db/, app/services/modest-fashion/, app/services/seasonal-banners/, app/services/white-friday/, app/services/weekend/, app/services/geolocation/, app/services/language-cookie/, app/services/brand-voice/, app/services/size-guide/, app/services/trust-badges/, app/services/fonts/. Check:
- How many of these 20+ services are real implementations vs empty stubs?
- Is the dialect detector accurate for Gulf Arabic vs Egyptian vs Levantine vs Maghrebi?
- Does the Hijri calendar correctly handle all edge cases (leap years, month boundaries)?
- Are prayer times calculated or fetched from an API? Is the source reliable?
- Is the fashion-db/modest-fashion content culturally appropriate and accurate?
- Do seasonal features (white-friday, seasonal-banners) have proper date triggers?
- Does geolocation correctly map IP to MENA countries for auto-locale?
- Are fonts (Noto Sans Arabic, Heebo, VazirMatn) loaded efficiently (subset, preload)?
- Is brand-voice actually enforcing tone consistency in AI-generated translations?
- Are there services here that duplicate logic already in the translation engine?

Output: audit table with [service, status (real/stub/partial), issues, recommendation].
